name: Lyra
lore: Story-battle version of Lyra. Same Red Ice kit as the playable card, but with a boss's stamina — a longer, multi-turn duel. Elite tier: acts three times per turn even alone.

skills.description: Does ATK-scaled damage to one enemy; applies [decay.stacks] Decay for [decay.duration] turns.
Does Pierce ATK-scaled damage to one enemy.

ultimate.description: Does Pierce ATK-scaled damage to all enemies.

passive.name: First Action: Unbreakable Ice
passive.description: When Lyra acts first in a turn, gains +100% DEF for 1 turn. This buff is unstackable and uncancellable.
